Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order To Voluntarily Dismiss Case And Request To Maintain The Seal As To Relator'S Identity; Declaration Of George Margolis, California Department Of Insurance
Off Calendar Nov-16-2021 Granted Per Written Order

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF'S UNDER SEAL Motion For Order To Voluntarily Dismiss Case And Request To Maintain The Seal As To Relator's Identity: Grant. No opposition filed, and good cause shown.

Order is signed.
